{{Quote|You ''no Daddy'' me! You let Ewok save you! You disgrace to Duloks!|King [[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]]|<ref name="Ewoks 13">[[Ewoks (1985) 13|''Ewoks'' (1985) 13]]</ref>}}
'''Boogutt''' was a [[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] [[Prince/Legends|prince]], the son of [[Gorneesh/Legends|Gorneesh]] and [[Urgah]] and a member of [[Gorneesh's tribe]] of Duloks who lived in a [[Dulok Swamp|swamp village]] near the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].

{{Char-stub}}
